debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Field K
inst✝ : NumberField K
x : RingOfIntegers K
y : K
u✝ : RingOfIntegers K
v✝ : (RingOfIntegers K)ˣ
hu : IsUnit u✝
u v : (RingOfIntegers K)ˣ
⊢ ↑↑(u / v) + 1 =
    (algebraMap (RingOfIntegers K) K) ↑u / ↑↑v +
      (algebraMap (RingOfIntegers K) K) ↑u / (algebraMap (RingOfIntegers K) K) ↑u

failed_attempts:
have h1 : (↑↑(u / v) : K) = (u : K) / ((v : 𝓞 K) : K) := by
    simp
  have h2 : (1 : 𝓞 K) = (u / u : 𝓞 K) := by
    simpa using (div_self u)
  -- now compare in `K`
  apply (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K).injective
  simp [map_add, h1, h2, div_self]

have huK : (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑u : 𝓞 K) ≠ 0 := by
    simpa using (map_ne_zero (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (show (↑u : 𝓞 K) ≠ 0 from Units.ne_zero _))
  have hvK : (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑v : 𝓞 K) ≠ 0 := by
    simpa using (map_ne_zero (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (show (↑v : 𝓞 K) ≠ 0 from Units.ne_zero _))
  have hdiv : (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑(u / v : (𝓞 K)ˣ) : 𝓞 K) =
      (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑u : 𝓞 K) / (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑v : 𝓞 K) := by
    simp [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, hvK]
  have hone : (1 : K) =
      (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑u : 𝓞 K) / (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑u : 𝓞 K) := by
    simp [huK]
  norm_cast
  simp [hdiv, hone, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]

have huK : (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑u : 𝓞 K) ≠ 0 := by
    simpa using (show (↑u : K) ≠ 0 from Units.ne_zero u)
  have hvK : (algebraMap (𝓞 K) K) (↑v : 𝓞 K) ≠ 0 := by
    simpa using (show (↑v : K) ≠ 0 from Units.ne_zero v)
  field_simp [huK, hvK]
  ring

-- coe to `K` and simplify there
  ext
  -- `simp` knows the coercions and division of units
  simp [div_eq_mul_inv, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
